initiatives.name: Oxygen Enrichment in Walking Beam Furnace
initiatives.description: Enrichment of oxygen to reduce Propane/LSHS consumption.

initiatives.name: Water Fixture Replacement
initiatives.description: Replaced 25 taps with efficient dual mist foam water nozzles.

initiatives.name: Floor Cleaning with Waste Water
initiatives.description: Cleaning of floors done using waste water and water tankers instead of soft water.

scope3Breakdown.note: FY2023 value from comparative column in FY2024 PDF.

enrichment.managementCommentary: The Company is unwavering in its dedication to creating a greener, more sustainable future, driven by a strong sense of environmental responsibility. As part of its commitment, the company has adopted an eco-conscious approach in manufacturing stainless steel. This involves utilizing scrap in an electric arc furnace, which stands as the most eco-friendly method with minimal greenhouse gas emissions, fostering a circular economy.

nonCompliance.description: No instances of regulatory penalties, environmental non-compliance, or fines reported.

forwardLooking.description: Evaluate realistic targets for reducing waste landfilled

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: Anti-corruption and Anti-bribery policy demonstrates zero tolerance towards bribery and corrupt practices. Manages conflict of interest through annual declarations from the Board and employees.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: Implements ISO 45001:2018 and adopts a 4-E principle (Engineering Control, Education, Encouragement, Enforcement) to promote an ACCIDENT-FREE STEEL culture.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Focuses on utilizing scrap in EAF to minimize GHG emissions. Evaluating biodiversity risk, planting native species, and ensuring Zero Liquid Discharge across facilities.

steelProduction.note: From plan config. Gemini derived ~1.58M t from emissions/intensity — difference may reflect saleable vs crude denominator.
